# CWE-328 safe — Use of Weak Hash (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-328-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"encoding/hex"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type SqlxDB struct{}

func (db *SqlxDB) Exec(query string, args ...interface{}) error { return nil }

func StorePasswordDigest(c *GinCtx, db *SqlxDB) error {
	password := c.Request.PostFormValue("password")
	salt := make([]byte, 16)
	if _, err := io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, salt); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	material := append(salt, []byte(password)...)
	sum := sha256.Sum256(material)
	digest := hex.EncodeToString(salt) + ":" + hex.EncodeToString(sum[:])
	return db.Exec("INSERT INTO accounts (email, pass_hash) VALUES (?, ?)", c.Request.PostFormValue("email"), digest)
}
